MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEW, WAH LEUNG SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-24-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-30-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

R.QUIDACHAY, JDG; SAWYER-PADUA, CSR; G.ESPINOCILLA, CLERK. 2:35 PM CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. A SETTLEMENT WAS READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS - JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF & AGAINST DEFT: POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 418 25TH AVE. #5, S.F; STAY TILL 12 MIDNIGHT 1/4/94; ALL RENTS & DAMAGES WAIVED; PLTF TO KEEP DEPOSIT; EACH SHALL BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT; PLTF TO FIX LOCK ON DEFT'S MAILBOX; NO FURTHER STAYS. JUDGMENT TO BE PREPARED BY THE PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGGIOLO, DENISE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 418-25TH AVE, #5, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL JAN-04-1994, LEASE FORFEITED
